sentence: 这个设计思路非常新颖。
english: This design concept is very original and fresh.

meaning: to precipitate (solid sediment out of a solution); to settle
sentence: 摇一摇瓶子，底部的沉淀就散开了。
pinyin: Yáo yi yáo píng zi, dǐ bù de chén diàn jiù sàn kāi le.
english: Give the bottle a shake and the sediment at the bottom will disperse.

sentence: 连续加班几个月，他感到有些抑郁。
pinyin: Liánxù jiābān jǐ gè yuè, tā gǎndào yǒuxiē yìyù.
english: After months of continuous overtime, he started feeling somewhat depressed.

sentence: 楼下装修的噪声让我没法睡觉。
pinyin: Lóu xià zhuāngxiū de zàoshēng ràng wǒ méifǎ shuìjiào.
english: The renovation noise from downstairs makes it impossible for me to sleep.

meaning: 1. to excise; 2. to cut out (a tumor)
sentence: 医生建议手术切除那颗囊肿。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì shǒushù qiēchú nà kē nángzhǒng.
english: The doctor recommended surgically removing the cyst.
